gh_d063e36b8c0b943c7bf1198b.title: [Remote] Senior Developer Node.js and Javascript (Fluent English) - [Stay]
gh_d063e36b8c0b943c7bf1198b.description:
Senior Developer Node.js and Javascript (Fluent English) only Brazil residents

Remote.

R$15k CLT.

Stays is the vacation rental software that increases your bookings on autopilot.
Our solutions involve improving the performance of the Saas platform, as well as calendar management, task management, reservation management, payment gateways, messaging services, site builders, advanced API communications. We are a company at Despegar group


 What do you must have:
- Minimum of 7 years of professional software development experience
- At least 5 years of hands-on experience with Node.js
- Strong Backend experience
- Experience with mongodb and Javascript
- Fluent English

 Expericence requeried:
- Node.js, JavaScript (including closures, callbacks, promises, and async/await)
- MongoDB database (including schema design and optimization)
- API Design. Designing and implementing scalable and secure APIs.
- Version Control. Advanced knowledge of Git, including branching strategies, pull requests, and code reviews.
- DevOps. CI/CD pipelines, containerization (Docker) and AWS cloud platform.
- Testing. Unit testing, integration testing using frameworks like Mocha, Jest, or similar.

 Our Benefits:
- health plan
- bonus
- food allowance
- home office allowance
- wellhub
- 100% remote
- Day off.

9h to 18h Brasília time zone.

Compensation: R$15k CLT.

Se tem interesse e os requisitos da oportunidade entre em contato pelo Linkedin abaixo, informando qual é a oportunidade:[https://www.linkedin.com/in/erickamarquesb/]
